content.en:
At first glance, Ye Tian was really shocked when he saw this stump.

He couldn't imagine what kind of tree it was, and how it was able to restore the Eternal Realm.

But one thing is certain, the origin of the Eternal Realm is instinctively absorbing the power of the stump, which can be quickly restored.

With such an amazing energy, who is not impressed, in case they can absorb one or two, their strength must not skyrocket?

But it's a pity that Ye Tian quickly absorbed these energies, but he couldn't absorb them, it didn't seem to be normal energy, and there was no way to absorb it at all.

The Eternal Realm can absorb it, it doesn't mean that Ye Tian and the other high-level realm gods can absorb it, these are two concepts.

If you can absorb the power of the stump, you can hope to control the stump.

The other side.

The demon seeds were also there to enlighten, but the pinnacle realm gods separated this area and did not come into contact with the demon seeds.

Obviously, neither the Realm Court Headquarters nor the Demon Seed Abyss want to be killed yet.

After all, it wouldn't even be worth it if you didn't even research anything out of the stump, so you fought desperately and suffered heavy losses.

Whether it's a god of the realm or a demon seed, it's not stupid.

The low-level demon seed can only kill, and naturally it doesn't care about interests, but the powerful demon seeds will be measured according to their interests, and they won't blindly kill the gods of the world, so there's no point.

These high-level realm gods and pinnacle realm gods are all here to participate in enlightenment and study.

In a short time, they are not leaving.

However, if you can really research something, you don't necessarily have to say it.

Of course, if something is researched and thus tested, it cannot be concealed, and those peak realm gods of the supreme power are also staring at other realm gods, and what they really research will inevitably be targeted, so that they can say it.

Otherwise, these supreme forces would not be kind enough to let the high-level realm gods of these top forces enter here to study.

The years passed.

One by one, the high-level realm gods had sad faces, but some of the high-level realm gods showed a trace of excitement, obviously they had researched something, but to say that there was a lot of research, it was impossible.

For them, every new discovery is enough to get them excited.

......

"The power contained in the stump should be a kind of power that surpasses us now, a leap of class, so we can't use it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If you can control this power, your strength will inevitably skyrocket.

But even if you master this power, you won't absorb a lot of energy, so you can only say that you can control a little bit of this power.

He didn't know if the supreme forces knew about it, but if they did, they wouldn't necessarily tell it.

In the blink of an eye, 100 billion years have passed.

this day.

Those supreme forces contacted Ye Tian and them, promised resources, shared the research results of this period of time, and once they were valuable, they would give a certain resource reward.

Some high-level realm gods have shared it, and they have indeed received rewards.

After that, as soon as these high-level realm gods researched something, they immediately rewarded it.

Although Ye Tian had also researched something, he was too far from controlling this power.

However, these supreme forces began to sell information again, but they needed to pay a lot of resources, which were enough to bankrupt the high-level realm gods.

But the information they give is bound to be very detailed and contains a lot of secrets.

Therefore, many high-level realm gods are thinking about whether they should buy this information.

"These supreme forces are really good at doing business, and in doing so, it is enough to sell a lot of information, and the information cannot be leaked, every high-level realm god has to buy it. Not only does it return to its original cost, but it also earns a lot of resources. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

As for whether there will be many high-level realm gods who will buy it, that's for sure, if it really produces major results that will help improve their strength, wouldn't it be a big profit!

For example, Ye Tian decided to buy this information.

He contacted the Stasis God to buy information.

"Stasis God, I use these resources to buy intelligence!"

Ye Tian took out a lot of resources and said.

"Okay, but the information needs to be sworn by the Eternal Dao Seed, and it must not be leaked!" said the Stasis God.

"No problem!"

Ye Tianying said.

Subsequently.

The Stasis God transmitted the information to Ye Tian, and Ye Tian also paid the resources.

......

Soon.

Ye Tian knew all the information clearly, and he also knew a lot of information.

"Although the supreme forces cannot control this stump, they do know a lot of information. "

Judging from these intelligence information, the power contained in this stump is called extradimensional power.

The so-called extradimensional power is a power that transcends all dimensions.

The power is divided into low-dimensional, medium-dimensional, and high-dimensional, like ordinary lifeforms are low-dimensional lifeforms, and embarking on the path of cultivation is equivalent to stepping into the middle dimension, while high-dimensional lifeforms are extremely powerful, have an eternal lifespan, and can resurrect ordinary beings at will.

But at Ye Tian's level, high-dimensional life is nothing, they can be regarded as reaching the limit of high-dimensional life forms.

And this stump power contains extradimensional power.

"It turns out that this power is a superdimensional power, and only extradimensional lifeforms can control the superdimensional power at will. The peak realm god still belongs to the realm god, and it is not yet a superdimensional life form, and this information also reveals the realm above the peak realm god - the superdimensional realm. Once you reach the transcendent realm, you can even resurrect the Eternal Realm God Realm!!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

What is the probability of resurrecting the Eternal Realm God Realm, which means that you can also resurrect a high-level realm god or even a peak realm god!

And a high-level realm god like him can't even resurrect the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm.

At this moment, he was extremely eager to become an extradimensional realm.

But one thing is certain, those supreme forces do not have extradimensional realms, otherwise they will definitely take away this stump power, and there is no need for them to come in and study this extradimensional thing.

Naturally, this information is not just an introduction to an extradimensional name, but also contains some important information.

For example, this stump is a stump from a certain extradimensional life plant, which will contain extradimensional power, and if you can control this stump, you will be able to exert extradimensional power and exert extradimensional means.

But obviously, it is undoubtedly extremely difficult to do this, and it is very difficult for peak realm gods to do it, let alone Ye Tian and them, who are peak realm gods.

The intelligence also mentions that you can create some secret techniques to perceive the extra-dimensional power, so as to gain some insights, and if you understand the infinite years, you may really be able to control a little bit of the extra-dimensional power.

As long as you can create a little extra-dimensional means, even if you are spicy chicken, your strength will skyrocket.
